steps.title: Convert percentage to decimal and set up multiplication
steps.content: The phrase 147% of last year's number means we multiply 200 by 147% in decimal form. Since 147% = 1.47, we set up: $$1.47 \times 200$$

steps.title: Compute the product and identify the answer
steps.content: $$1.47 \times 200 = 294$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
